veshilachetam el-melekh edovm veel-melekh movav veel-melekh beney 'amovn veel-melekh tsor veel-melekh tsidovn beyad maleakhim habaim yerushalaim el-tsideqiyahu melekh yehuda
vetsivita otam el-adoneyhem lemor koh-amar yehva tsevaovt elohey yiserael ko tomeru el-adoneykhem
anokhi 'asiti et-haarets et-haadam veet-habehema asher 'al-peney haarets bekhochi hagadovl uvizerov'i hanetuya unetatiha laasher yashar be'eynay
ve'ata anokhi natati et-kal-haaratsovt haele beyad nevukhadenetsar melekhe-bavel 'avedi vegam et-chayat hasade natati lov le'avedov
ve'avedu otov kal-hagovyim veet-benov veet-ben-benov 'ad bo-'et aretsov gam-hu ve'avedu vov govyim rabim umelakhim gedolim

vehaya hagovy vehamamelakha asher lo-ya'avedu otov et-nevukhadenetsar melekhe-bavel veet asher lo-yiten et-tsavarov be'ol melekh bavel bacherev uvara'av uvadever efeqod 'al-hagovy hahu neum-yehva 'ad-tumi otam beyadov
veatem al-tisheme'u el-nevieykhem veel-qosemeykhem veel chalomoteykhem veel-'oneneykhem veel-kashafeykhem asher-hem omerim aleykhem lemor lo ta'avedu et-melekh bavel
ki sheqer hem nibeim lakhem lema'an harechiq etekhem me'al adematekhem vehidacheti etekhem vaavadetem
vehagovy asher yavi et-tsavarov be'ol melekhe-bavel va'avadov vehinachetiv 'al-adematov neum-yehva va'avadah veyashav bah
veel-tsideqiya melekhe-yehuda dibareti kekhal-hadevarim haele lemor haviu et-tsavereykhem be'ol melekhe-bavel ve'ivedu otov ve'amov vicheyu
lama tamutu ata ve'amekha bacherev bara'av uvadaver kaasher diber yehva el-hagovy asher lo-ya'avod et-melekh bavel
veal-tisheme'u el-diverey haneviim haomerim aleykhem lemor lo ta'avedu et-melekh bavel ki sheqer hem nibeim lakhem
ki lo shelachetim neum-yehva vehem nibeim bishemi lashaqer lema'an hadichi etekhem vaavadetem atem vehaneviim hanibeim lakhem

veel-hakohanim veel-kal-ha'am haze dibareti lemor ko amar yehva al-tisheme'u el-diverey nevieykhem hanibeim lakhem lemor hine kheley veyt-yehva mushavim mibavela 'ata mehera ki sheqer hema nibeim lakhem

bavela yuvau veshama yiheyu 'ad yovm paqedi otam neum-yehva veha'alitim vahashivotim el-hamaqovm haze f

hanavi asher yinave leshalovm bevo devar hanavi yivada' hanavi asher-shelachov yehva beemet
vayiqach chananeya hanavi et-hamovta me'al tsavar yiremeya hanavi vayisheberehu
vayomer chananeya le'eyney khal-ha'am lemor ko amar yehva kakha eshebor et-'ol ׀ nevukhadenetsar melekhe-bavel be'ovd shenatayim yamim me'al-tsavar kal-hagovyim vayelekh yiremeya hanavi ledarekov f
vayehi devar-yehva el-yiremeya acharey shevovr chananeya hanavi et-hamovta me'al tsavar yiremeya hanavi lemor
halovkh veamareta el-chananeya lemor ko amar yehva movtot 'ets shavareta ve'asita tacheteyhen motovt barezel

vayomer yiremeya hanavi el-chananeya hanavi shema'-na chananeya lo-shelachakha yehva veata hivetacheta et-ha'am haze 'al-shaqer
lakhen ko amar yehva hineni meshalechakha me'al peney haadama hashana ata met ki-sara dibareta el-yehva
vayamat chananeya hanavi bashana hahi bachodesh hashevi'i f

beyad ele'asa ven-shafan ugemareya ben-chileqiya asher shalach tsideqiya melekhe-yehuda el-nevukhadenetsar melekh bavel bavela lemor s
ko amar yehva tsevaovt elohey yiserael lekhal-hagovla asher-higeleyti mirushalaim bavela
benu vatim veshevu venite'u ganovt veikhelu et-pireyan

ki kho amar yehva tsevaovt elohey yiserael al-yashiu lakhem nevieykhem asher-beqirebekhem veqosemeykhem veal-tisheme'u el-chalomoteykhem asher atem machelemim

ki-kho amar yehva ki lefi melot levavel shive'im shana efeqod etekhem vahaqimoti 'aleykhem et-devari hatovv lehashiv etekhem el-hamaqovm haze

uviqashetem oti umetsatem ki tidereshuni bekhal-levavekhem

ki amaretem heqim lanu yehva neviim bavela s

ko amar yehva tsevaovt hineni meshalecha bam et-hacherev et-hara'av veet-hadaver venatati ovtam kateenim hasho'arim asher lo-teakhalena mero'a
veradafeti achareyhem bacherev bara'av uvadaver unetatim lizeva'a kh leza'ava q lekhol ׀ mamelekhovt haarets leala uleshama velishereqa ulecherepa bekhal-hagovyim asher-hidachetim sham
tachat asher-lo-shame'u el-devaray neum-yehva asher shalacheti aleyhem et-'avaday haneviim hashekem veshalocha velo shema'etem neum-yehva
veatem shime'u devar-yehva kal-hagovla asher-shilacheti mirushalaim bavela s
koh-amar yehva tsevaovt elohey yiserael el-acheav ben-qovlaya veel-tsideqiyahu ven-ma'aseya hanibeim lakhem bishemi shaqer hineni ׀ noten otam beyad nevukhaderetsar melekhe-bavel vehikam le'eyneykhem
veluqach mehem qelala lekhol galut yehuda asher bevavel lemor yesimekha yehva ketsideqiyahu ukheechav asher-qalam melekhe-bavel baesh
ya'an asher 'asu nevala beyiserael vayenaafu et-neshey re'eyhem vayedaberu davar bishemi sheqer asher lov tsivitim veanokhi huyode'a kh hayovde'a q va'ed neum-yehva s
veel-shema'eyahu hanechelami tomar lemor
koh-amar yehva tsevaovt elohey yiserael lemor ya'an asher ata shalacheta veshimekha sefarim el-kal-ha'am asher birushalaim veel-tsefaneya ven-ma'aseya hakohen veel kal-hakohanim lemor
yehva netanekha khohen tachat yehovyada' hakohen liheyovt peqidim beyt yehva lekhal-ish meshuga' umitenabe venatata otov el-hamahepekhet veel-hatsinoq

ki 'al-ken shalach eleynu bavel lemor aruka hi benu vatim veshevu venite'u ganovt veikhelu et-perihen
vayiqera tsefaneya hakohen et-hasefer haze beazeney yiremeyahu hanavi f
vayehi devar-yehva el-yiremeyahu lemor
shelach 'al-kal-hagovla lemor ko amar yehva el-shema'eya hanechelami ya'an asher niba lakhem shema'eya vaani lo shelachetiv vayavetach etekhem 'al-shaqer

lakhen koh-amar yehva hineni foqed 'al-shema'eya hanechelami ve'al-zare'ov lo-yiheye lov ish ׀ yovshev ׀ betovkhe-ha'am haze velo-yiree vatovv asher-ani 'oseh-le'ami neum-yehva ki-sara diber 'al-yehva s
hadavar asher haya el-yiremeyahu meet yehva lemor
koh-amar yehva elohey yiserael lemor ketav-lekha et kal-hadevarim asher-dibareti eleykha el-sefer
ki hine yamim baim neum-yehva veshaveti et-shevut 'ami yiserael vihuda amar yehva vahashivotim el-haarets asher-natati laavovtam vireshuha f
veele hadevarim asher diber yehva el-yiserael veel-yehuda
ki-kho amar yehva qovl charada shama'enu pachad veeyn shalovm
shaalu-na ureu im-yoled zakhar madu'a raiti khal-gever yadayv 'al-chalatsayv kayovleda venehefekhu khal-panim leyeraqovn
hovy ki gadovl hayovm hahu meayin kamohu ve'et-tsara hi leya'aqov umimena yivashe'a
vehaya vayovm hahu neum ׀ yehva tsevaovt eshebor 'ulov me'al tsavarekha umovserovteykha anateq velo-ya'avedu-vov 'ovd zarim
ve'avedu et yehva eloheyhem veet david malekam asher aqim lahem s
veata al-tira 'avedi ya'aqov neum-yehova veal-techat yiserael ki hineni movshi'akha merachovq veet-zare'akha meerets shiveyam veshav ya'aqov veshaqat veshaanan veeyn macharid
ki-itekha ani neum-yehva lehovshi'ekha ki e'ese khala bekhal-hagovyim ׀ asher hafitsovtikha sham akh otekha lo-e'ese khala veyisaretikha lamishepat venaqe lo anaqeka f
ki kho amar yehva anush leshiverekh nachela makatekh
eyn-dan dinekh lemazovr refuovt te'ala eyn lakh
kal-meahavayikh shekhechukh ovtakh lo yideroshu ki makat ovyev hikitikh musar akhezari 'al rov 'aonekh 'atsemu chatotayikh
mah-tize'aq 'al-shiverekh anush makheovekh 'al ׀ rov 'aonekh 'atsemu chatotayikh 'asiti ele lakh
lakhen kal-okhelayikh yeakhelu vekhal-tsarayikh kulam bashevi yelekhu vehayu shosayikh limeshisa vekhal-bozezayikh eten lavaz
ki a'ale arukha lakh umimakovtayikh erepaekh neum-yehva ki nidacha qareu lakh tsiyovn hi doresh eyn lah s
ko ׀ amar yehva hineni-shav shevut aholey ya'aqovv umishekenotayv arachem veniveneta 'ir 'al-tilah vearemovn 'al-mishepatov yeshev
veyatsa mehem tovda veqovl mesachaqim vehirebitim velo yime'atu vehikhebadetim velo yitse'aru
vehayu vanayv keqedem va'adatov lefanay tikovn ufaqadeti 'al kal-lochatsayv
vehaya adirov mimenu umoshelov miqirebov yetse vehiqeravetiv venigash elay ki mi hu-ze 'arav et-libov lageshet elay neum-yehva
viheyitem li le'am veanokhi eheye lakhem lelohim s
hine ׀ sa'arat yehva chema yatsea sa'ar mitegovrer 'al rosh resha'im yachul
lo yashuv charovn af-yehva 'ad-'asotov ve'ad-haqimov mezimovt libov beacharit hayamim titebovnenu vah
ba'et hahi neum-yehva eheye lelohim lekhol mishepechovt yiserael vehema yiheyu-li le'am s
ko amar yehva matsa chen bamidebar 'am seridey charev halovkh leharegi'ov yiserael
merachovq yehva nirea li veahavat 'ovlam ahavetikh 'al-ken meshakhetikh chased
'ovd evenekh veniveneyt betulat yiserael 'ovd ta'edi tupayikh veyatsat bimechovl mesachaqim
'ovd tite'i kheramim beharey shomerovn nate'u note'im vechilelu
ki yesh-yovm qareu notserim behar eferayim qumu vena'ale tsiyovn el-yehva eloheynu f
ki-kho ׀ amar yehva ranu leya'aqov simecha vetsahalu berosh hagovyim hashemi'u halelu veimeru hovsha' yehva et-'amekha et sheerit yiserael
hineni mevi ovtam meerets tsafovn veqibatsetim miyareketey-arets bam 'iver ufisecha hara veyoledet yachedav qahal gadovl yashuvu hena
bivekhi yavou uvetachanunim ovvilem ovlikhem el-nachaley mayim bederekh yashar lo yikashelu bah ki-hayiti leyiserael leav veeferayim bekhori hu s
shime'u devar-yehva govyim vehagidu vaiyim mimerechaq veimeru mezare yiserael yeqabetsenu ushemarov kero'e 'ederov
ki-fada yehva et-ya'aqov ugealov miyad chazaq mimenu
uvau verinenu vimerovm-tsiyovn venaharu el-tuv yehva 'al-dagan ve'al-tirosh ve'al-yitsehar ve'al-beney-tson uvaqar vehayeta nafesham kegan rave velo-yovsifu ledaava 'ovd
az tisemach betula bemachovl uvachurim uzeqenim yachedav vehafakheti evelam lesasovn venichametim vesimachetim migovnam
veriveyti nefesh hakohanim dashen ve'ami et-tuvi yiseba'u neum-yehva s
ko ׀ amar yehva qovl berama nishema' nehi bekhi tamerurim rachel mevaka 'al-baneyha meana lehinachem 'al-baneyha ki eynenu s
ko ׀ amar yehva mine'i qovlekh mibekhi ve'eynayikh midime'a ki yesh sakhar life'ulatekh neum-yehva veshavu meerets ovyev
veyesh-tiqeva leacharitekh neum-yehva veshavu vanim ligevulam s

ki-acharey shuvi nichameti veacharey hivade'i safaqeti 'al-yarekh bosheti vegam-nikhelameti ki nasati cherepat ne'uray
haven yaqir li eferayim im yeled sha'ashu'im ki-midey daberi bov zakhor ezekerenu 'ovd 'al-ken hamu me'ay lov rachem arachamenu neum-yehva s

im-yamushu hachuqim haele milefanay neum-yehva gam zera' yiserael yishebetu miheyovt govy lefanay kal-hayamim s

vekhal-ha'emeq hapegarim ׀ vehadeshen vekhal hasheremovt kh hashedemovt q 'ad-nachal qiderovn 'ad-pinat sha'ar hasusim mizeracha qodesh layhva lo-yinatesh velo-yehares 'ovd le'ovlam s
